middleware.description: Applied to POST /api/v1/coupons/{code}/preview + GET /api/v1/coupons/validate/{code} — prevents brute-force enumeration of tenant coupon codes by rate-limiting to 10 attempts per IP per hour + 60 attempts per authenticated user per hour. On refusal returns 429 `COUPON_RATE_LIMIT` with Retry-After header. Rate-limit buckets are IP-hash + user_id keyed; keys expire on the hour boundary.

Thin wrapper over entitlement.enforce that specifically checks the `coupon_capture` entitlement. On refusal returns 402 `COUPON_CAPTURE_NOT_ENTITLED` with an upgrade CTA in the response envelope's .errors[0].meta.upgrade_url.

consumed.note: The permission-based authorize middleware wraps the ability checks defined in policies.json + permissions.json.
compliance::consent's consent gate. Marketing-consent required for coupon.redeemed real-time push (opt-in stream).
